name: pdesk-ingest-in-webview
description: The desktop Import Directory contract, proven on the packaged exe with NO node on PATH and no dev-machine script path (ADR 0043, platform-foundation P3). walkDirectory now runs IN THE WEBVIEW over a TauriFsAdapter — the Rust ingest_directory command (which shelled out to node scripts/ingest-directory.mjs via a compile-time CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR path) is DELETED. Builds a 3-file tree (a.md with a frontmatter link to b.md, b.md via the flat debug_write_file channel; a .qualia.json solution so bindVault binds; sub/c.md through the bound adapter since the debug writer can't make subdirs), then drives __canaryIngestDirectory: (1) a read-only qverses ingest asserting the exact known-answer from the CLI on an identical tree — 3 nodes (a.md,b.md,sub/c.md; the .qualia.json is skipped, not re-ingested), 2 contexts (atlas+sub), the frontmatter edge a.md->b.md present, zero warnings — plus a store-untouched check (read-only: the ingest never loads its graph); (2) a per-directory ingest with write:true that writes .qualia.json into the vault (the mode's real intent — the old Rust path wrote to a temp dir and discarded them) and read-back-verifies each landed + parses, asserting filesWritten === 2 and a final re-ingest still sees exactly 3 source files. Binds the global adapter to write sub/c.md, so it runs in the suite's trailing rebinding block. Vault lives at <Qualia repo>/debug-logs/parity-vault-p3-ingest/ (fixed filenames — overwritten per run). Re-runnable because the walk skips BOTH a prior run's per-directory .qualia.json outputs AND the .qualia.rag/ sidecar that bindVault's RAG hydration drops into the vault (added to DEFAULT_SKIP — P3 review; without it a second run ingested the sidecar's json caches as code nodes → nodeCount 6). The hook's write step now read-back-compares exact bytes (each graph carries a fresh ingestedAt), so a stale leftover cannot satisfy it.

commands:
(async () => { const step = (name, e) => { if (!e || e.ok !== true) throw new Error(name + ' failed: ' + JSON.stringify(e)); return e.value; }; const origAlert = window.alert; const origConfirm = window.confirm; window.alert = () => undefined; window.confirm = () => true; try { const SESSION = 'parity-vault-p3-ingest'; const aMd = '---
links:
  - ./b.md
---

# A

See B.
'; const aPath = step('write a.md', await window.__canaryDebugWrite(SESSION, 'a.md', aMd)); const vaultDir = aPath.slice(0, aPath.lastIndexOf('/')); step('write b.md', await window.__canaryDebugWrite(SESSION, 'b.md', '# B
')); const solutionText = step('exportGraph', await window.__canaryExportGraph()); step('write .qualia.json', await window.__canaryDebugWrite(SESSION, '.qualia.json', solutionText)); const bind = step('bindVault', await window.__canaryBindVault(vaultDir)); if (!bind.solution) throw new Error('bindVault found no .qualia.json in ' + vaultDir); const cB64 = btoa('# C
'); const cWrite = step('write sub/c.md', await window.__canaryFsRoundtrip('sub/c.md', cB64)); if (cWrite.readBackBase64 !== cB64) throw new Error('sub/c.md roundtrip mismatch: ' + cWrite.readBackBase64); const q = step('ingest qverses', await window.__canaryIngestDirectory(vaultDir, { nestMode: 'qverses', edges: 'frontmatter' })); if (q.mode !== 'qverses') throw new Error('mode ' + q.mode + ' != qverses'); if (q.nodeCount !== 3) throw new Error('nodeCount ' + q.nodeCount + ' != 3 (a.md,b.md,sub/c.md; .qualia.json must be skipped, not re-ingested)'); if (q.contextCount !== 2) throw new Error('contextCount ' + q.contextCount + ' != 2 (atlas + sub)'); if (q.edgeCount !== 1) throw new Error('edgeCount ' + q.edgeCount + ' != 1 (expected exactly the frontmatter edge a.md->b.md; >1 = dedup/hierarchical-leak regression, 0 = frontmatter extraction dead)'); if (q.warnings.length !== 0) throw new Error('warnings on a clean tree: ' + JSON.stringify(q.warnings)); const leak = window.__canaryGetNodeSnapshot('sub/c.md'); if (leak && leak.ok === true) throw new Error('ingest auto-loaded its graph into the store (found sub/c.md) — __canaryIngestDirectory must be read-only'); const pd = step('ingest per-directory write', await window.__canaryIngestDirectory(vaultDir, { nestMode: 'per-directory', edges: 'frontmatter', write: true })); if (pd.filesWritten !== 2) throw new Error('filesWritten ' + pd.filesWritten + ' != 2 (root + sub)'); if (!pd.writtenPaths || !pd.writtenPaths.includes('.qualia.json') || !pd.writtenPaths.includes('sub/.qualia.json')) throw new Error('writtenPaths missing expected entries: ' + JSON.stringify(pd.writtenPaths)); const re = step('re-ingest after write', await window.__canaryIngestDirectory(vaultDir, { nestMode: 'qverses', edges: 'frontmatter' })); if (re.nodeCount !== 3) throw new Error('re-ingest nodeCount ' + re.nodeCount + ' != 3 (freshly written per-directory .qualia.json must stay walk-skipped)'); return 'pass: in-webview ingest — qverses 3 nodes / 2 ctx / ' + q.edgeCount + ' edge, read-only (store untouched); per-directory wrote ' + pd.filesWritten + ' .qualia.json into the vault; re-ingest still 3'; } finally { window.alert = origAlert; window.confirm = origConfirm; } })()
